_comment: Thresholds for /sap-cutover-runbook checkpoint --health. Override at {custom_url}\cutover_health.json. Each probe: warn/crit row-count thresholds. A count >= crit -> HIGH finding; >= warn -> MEDIUM; else INFO. An unreachable probe is COULD_NOT_CHECK and caps the verdict at GO_WITH_WARNINGS.

dumps.label: ABAP short dumps since cutover start (SNAP)
